overview: A privacy-focused, mobile-first WhatsApp-clone chat application for 3-4 users. Features phone OTP login via Firebase Auth (placeholder), disappearing messages with type-specific deletion rules, tap-to-translate with multi-API fallback, strict admin control over user access, and full multi-language UI support (English, Spanish, Portuguese). Pre-configured for Capacitor APK export.
features: WhatsApp-style UI with green theme and chat bubbles
Firebase Auth phone OTP login (placeholder credentials)
Conversation list and private chat views
Disappearing messages: text (2min), images (view-once), audio/video (after play)
Tap-to-translate with MyMemory → LibreTranslate → DeepL fallback
Full i18next localization: English, Spanish, Portuguese
